name: Code Search
description: Read-only tools for querying a local code-search-api semantic index by intent.

url.description: Base URL for the running code-search-api service.

apiKey.description: Optional code-search-api key. Leave blank and set CODE_SEARCH_API_KEY in the environment instead.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable to read the API key from when apiKey is blank.

url.label: API URL
url.help: The local code-search-api base URL, usually http://localhost:5204.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional. Sent as X-API-Key when the FastAPI service requires authentication.
